get.description: Return users (superuser only).

post.description: Create a user (superuser only).

400.description: User with this email already exists

get.description: Return the currently authenticated user.

patch.description: Update profile fields for the currently authenticated user.
Change password for the currently authenticated user.

400.description: Current password incorrect or new password unchanged

post.description: Create a new user account without authentication. Public endpoint for user registration.

400.description: User with this email already exists

get.description: Return user by ID. Non-superusers can only fetch themselves.

patch.description: Update a user by ID (superuser only).

delete.description: Delete a user by ID (superuser only).

get.description: Return roles (superuser only).

post.description: Create a role (superuser only).

get.description: Return a role by ID (superuser only).
Return permissions (superuser only).

post.description: Create a permission (superuser only).

get.description: Return a permission by ID (superuser only).
Return role assignments, optionally filtered by user_id (superuser only).

post.description: Create a user-role assignment (superuser only).

get.description: Return a role assignment by ID (superuser only).
Return the current user's HR profile (identity, employment, address, preferences).

404.description: HR profile not found for this user

patch.description: Update the current user's HR profile (identity, address, preferences).

404.description: HR profile not found for this user

patch.description: Update a user's employment record and approval authority. Supervisor or admin only.

404.description: User or employment record not found

post.description: Create a new workflow template. Requires workflow.template.manage permission.

get.description: List workflow templates, optionally filtered by department_id. Requires workflow.template.view permission.

post.description: Create a step template for a workflow template. Requires workflow.template.manage permission.
Create a new workflow instance from a template. Template must exist.

get.description: Return a workflow instance and its step instances. Requires workflow.instance.view permission.

post.description: Submit, approve, reject, return, or cancel a workflow instance. Requires workflow.instance.action and step-level role. May return 400 if workflow state does not allow the action.

400.description: Workflow cannot be submitted or is not pending

404.description: Workflow instance or step not found

403.description: Not allowed to perform this workflow action

get.description: Return the active shift catalog for roster assignment.

post.description: Create a new roster period. Requires roster.manage permission.
Create or replace roster assignments for a period. Requires roster.manage permission.

schema.title: Response Bulk Assignments Api V1 Hr Rosters Assignments Bulk Post

get.description: Return a roster period and its assignments. Requires roster.view permission.

post.description: Validate CSV content for roster import. Requires roster.import permission.

400.description: Invalid CSV (e.g. missing header or columns)

post.description: Create roster import job and optionally apply valid rows. Requires roster.import permission.

patch.description: Transition a draft roster period to published. Requires roster.manage permission.
Close a published roster period. Requires roster.manage permission.

400.description: Period not published or already closed

get.description: Return the revision history for a roster period. Requires roster.view permission.

post.description: Add a public holiday. Requires roster.manage permission.

get.description: Return public holidays, optionally filtered by year. Requires roster.view permission.

delete.description: Remove a public holiday. Requires roster.manage permission.

post.description: Create a new timesheet (self or proxy). Policy controls self/proxy submission.

403.description: Self/proxy submission disabled or not allowed for user

patch.description: Submit a draft timesheet (self or proxy). Requires timesheet.submit.self or timesheet.submit.proxy.

403.description: Not allowed (self only for own; proxy not allowed)

patch.description: Approve a submitted timesheet. Requires timesheet.approve and scope over the user.

403.description: Not allowed to approve this timesheet

get.description: Return timesheets for the current user.
Return timesheets for a department. Requires timesheet.read.department permission.
Return hours aggregated by shift code. Owner or user with timesheet.read.department over the owner.

403.description: Not allowed to read this timesheet

get.description: Return a timesheet and its entries. Owner or user with timesheet.read.department over the owner.

403.description: Not allowed to read this timesheet

post.description: Create a leave request for the current user. Requires leave.request.create.self permission.

patch.description: Approve or update a leave request. Requires leave.request.action and scope over the user.

403.description: Not allowed to action this leave request

get.description: Return leave requests for the current user.

post.description: Create an absentee report. Requires absentee.report.create permission.

get.description: List absentee reports (own or by department). Department filter requires absentee.report.read.department.

post.description: Create a shift swap request. Requires shift_swap.request.create.self permission.

patch.description: Approve or reject a shift swap request. Requires shift_swap.request.action and scope over the requesting user.

403.description: Not allowed to action this shift swap

post.description: Create a status report with optional personnel entries. Requires status.report.create permission.

get.description: List status reports. Requires status.report.read permission. Optionally filter by department_id.
Return a status report with its personnel entries. Requires status.report.read permission.

post.description: Test emails.

get.description: Simple liveness probe; returns 200 if the process is running.

schema.title: Response Health Check Api V1 Utils Health Check  Get

get.description: Readiness probe; returns 200 if the app can reach the database, 503 otherwise.

schema.title: Response Ready Api V1 Utils Ready  Get
